overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character in a tan suit walking through a New Orleans-inspired historic district. The scene features wet streets reflecting overcast skies, 1960s vintage vehicles, wrought iron balconies, and distinctive French Quarter architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with parked vintage cars

events.description: red vintage convertible pulls out from parking spot and drives away

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past parked vintage cars and storefronts with pink shutters

notable_agents.action: leaning against building wall near the doorway

entered.detail: parked 1960s red convertible with white wall tires and chrome details
historic brick building with pink wooden shutters and green doorways
purple neon sign hanging above the storefront entrance
black ornate cast iron street lamp along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet commercial sidewalk lined with parked vintage cars. A red convertible pulls out and drives away. The street features historic brick buildings with pink shutters and neon signage, while a pedestrian leans against the wall nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alley with residential balconies

events.description: turns right from main street into narrow brick-paved alleyway between buildings

agents.ego_description: turns into a narrow alley and continues walking between historic residential buildings with wrought iron balconies

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with white wrought iron balconies and potted plants
wet red brick pavement in the narrow passage between buildings
wooden utility pole with overhead power lines spanning the alley

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrow enclosed alley with wet brick pavement. The alley is flanked by residential buildings featuring white wrought iron balconies with potted plants. Overhead utility wires crisscross between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with historic church view

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza with view of white church cathedral
crosses the street between moving vintage vehicles

agents.ego_description: emerges from the alley, turns left and crosses the street toward the church, navigating between cars

notable_agents.action: walking across the street from right to left in front of the character

entered.detail: large white historic church with twin towers and central spire resembling St. Louis Cathedral
tall palm trees lining the street in front of the church
wet cobblestone pavement at the street crossing

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a wide plaza with a prominent white church cathedral in the distance. The character crosses the wet cobblestone street between moving vintage cars, while another pedestrian crosses from the right. Palm trees frame the view of the church.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with continuous iron awnings

events.description: steps onto covered sidewalk with overhead awnings on the opposite side of the street
approaches crosswalk at intersection with stop sign visible

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered sidewalk awnings, passing storefronts and street trees while approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking ahead under the awnings

entered.detail: continuous iron and canvas awning covering the sidewalk attached to the building facade
ornate historic building with balconies and shuttered windows behind the awnings
mature deciduous trees with green canopy along the curb
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge near the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk protected by continuous iron awnings. The street is lined with mature trees on the left and historic building facades on the right. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks ahead in the same direction as the character approaches a crosswalk at the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic district, transitioning from a bustling commercial street into a secluded alleyway before opening onto a grand plaza. It begins on a wet sidewalk lined with vintage cars and brick buildings with pink shutters, where a red convertible pulls away into the overcast light. As the character turns right, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed alley flanked by residential buildings with white wrought iron balconies and crisscrossing utility wires overhead. The camera then emerges from the alley into a wide, open plaza, crossing wet cobblestones between moving traffic toward a prominent white cathedral framed by palm trees. Finally, the view moves along a covered sidewalk beneath continuous iron awnings, following a pedestrian with an umbrella past mature trees toward a city intersection.
